summary: Tested Obsidian Cinema landing page for non-authenticated users. All 14 test cases passed. Landing page renders correctly with hero section, 9 feature cards, 'How It Works' section (3 steps), pricing section (Free $0 + Pro $20), CTA section, and footer. All data-testid attributes are present. Smooth scroll navigation works for Features and Pricing links. Sign In button correctly redirects to Google OAuth (auth.emergentagent.com). SEO meta tags verified (Open Graph, Twitter Card, keywords, author, robots).
passed_tests: Hero heading shows 'Your movie library, beautifully organized.'
Hero Get Started Free button (data-testid='hero-get-started-btn') present
Feature cards: Scan Any Drive, TMDB Posters & Metadata, One-Click Playback, Advanced Sorting, Library Stats, 18 Color Themes, Recently Deleted, Manual Poster Editor, Auto Updates
How It Works section shows 3 steps: Download & Install, Point to Your Drives, Browse & Play
CTA section with Get Started Free button (data-testid='cta-get-started-btn')
Footer shows copyright 2026 and Obsidian Cinema branding
Features nav link smooth scrolls to #features section
Pricing nav link smooth scrolls to #pricing section
Sign In button navigates to https://auth.emergentagent.com/
og:title meta tag present: 'Obsidian Cinema — Your Movie Library, Beautifully Organized'
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx implements all required sections correctly with proper data-testid attributes
App.js correctly redirects non-authenticated users from / to /landing (line 54)
handleLogin function correctly constructs OAuth URL with redirect parameter
index.html has complete SEO meta tags (Open Graph, Twitter Card, keywords, author, robots)
Smooth scroll behavior implemented correctly using scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
seed_data_creation: None required - testing non-authenticated landing page
